message:
fix(overlays): Improve touch accessibility and z-index layering

Addresses accessibility issues and z-index conflicts with the control deck.

Overlay.tsx:
- Close button now meets WCAG 2.5.5 touch target requirements (44x44px)
- Device-aware close hints:
  - Desktop: "ESC or {hotkey} to close"
  - Mobile: "Tap outside to close" or "Tap × to close" based on backdrop setting
- Close button has hover state with background transition
- Font size increased to 1.5rem for better visibility
- Added borderRadius and display:flex for proper centering

OverlayProvider.tsx:
- BASE_Z_INDEX increased from 100 to 500
- Fixes overlay appearing behind ControlDeck (z-index: 300)
- Now properly uses --z-modal CSS variable value
- Added explanatory comment for z-index hierarchy

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
